name: ArGo PVC Travel Tube With Cap
summary: ArGo PVC Travel Tube With Cap — a carry case for carrying your kit safely.
description: Crafted for the popular ArGo Vaporiser, the Arizer ArGo accessory is a compact PVC Tube that guarantees easy material transportation and comes with a secure sealing cap to avoid any potential spills. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer. Keeps your kit protected and discreet in transit.
